posts.title: Queuing Emails in Laravel: Mailables, Queues, and Retries Done Right
posts.altTitle: Stop Sending Emails Synchronously in Laravel - Here's the Fix
posts.excerpt: Learn how to offload transactional emails to Laravel Queues using Mailables, so your app stays fast and emails keep flowing even when things break.

posts.title: Debounce vs Throttle in JavaScript: When to Use Each (With Real Examples)
posts.altTitle: Your Search Input Is Killing Your API - Fix It With Debounce
posts.excerpt: Debounce and throttle are two tools that control how often a function runs. Learn the difference, when each applies, and how to build both from scratch.

posts.title: Build a Multi-Step Form Wizard With Alpine.js - No Backend Needed
posts.altTitle: Multi-Step Forms in Alpine.js: State, Validation, and Clean UX in 80 Lines
posts.excerpt: Build a clean multi-step form wizard using Alpine.js with per-step validation, progress tracking, and smooth transitions - all in the browser, no framework needed.

posts.title: Zero-Downtime Laravel Deployments With GitHub Actions on a Single VPS
posts.altTitle: How to Deploy Laravel Without Taking Your App Offline
posts.excerpt: Set up a zero-downtime deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions, SSH, and symlink-based releases so your Laravel app stays live through every deploy.

posts.title: Rate Limiting API Routes in Laravel: Throttle Middleware and Custom Limiters
posts.altTitle: Stop API Abuse in Laravel Before It Costs You Money
posts.excerpt: Learn how to protect your Laravel API with built-in throttle middleware, custom rate limiters per user tier, and proper 429 error responses.

posts.title: Async/Await Error Handling in JavaScript: Stop Letting Errors Disappear
posts.altTitle: Your Async JavaScript Is Silently Failing - Here's How to Fix It
posts.excerpt: Learn practical patterns for handling errors in async/await JavaScript code so failures surface clearly, get logged properly, and never silently swallow exceptions.

posts.title: Build a CRUD REST API in Laravel With Sanctum Authentication
posts.altTitle: Laravel API From Scratch: Auth, Resources, and Clean JSON in 60 Minutes
posts.excerpt: Build a fully authenticated CRUD REST API in Laravel using Sanctum for token auth, API Resources for clean JSON, and proper validation on every endpoint.

posts.title: Dockerise Your Laravel App for Local Development (The Right Way)
posts.altTitle: Ditch XAMPP: Set Up Laravel With Docker in 20 Minutes
posts.excerpt: Set up a consistent Laravel local development environment with Docker Compose - PHP-FPM, Nginx, MySQL, and Redis - so every dev on your team runs the same stack.
